app.title: WILL Romania — Sprint 4
login.heading: WILL Sign In
login.placeholder.note: Sprint 0–4 accept any non-empty username and the password "will-dev".
nav.label: View
globe.heading: Common Operating Picture
layers.label: Track layers
plugins.heading: Plugins
admin.themeHint: Edit the JSON theme. Apply primaryColor, bannerLabel, and affiliationColors to rebrand the operator view.
admin.selectPrompt: Select a tenant on the left to edit its theme.
sensors.heading: Sensor Registry
sensors.hint: Bulk-register sensors as a JSON array. Required fields: external_id, family, display_name. Optional: home_lat, home_lon, classification, metadata.
sensors.error.notArray: Bulk JSON must be an array of objects.
members.heading: Members & Roles
members.hint: Grant tenant-scoped roles (viewer, operator, admin, auditor, cross_tenant_auditor). NPKI binding lands in Sprint 10.
members.empty: No members on this tenant yet.
